calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-05-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-05-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Deft To Provide Responses To Special Interrogatories And Req.'S For Production Of Documents And Req. For Monetary Sanctions; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Pos
Off Calendar Aug-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Keith M. Velleca, Esq. of L/O of Keith Velleca, Tel. 415.293.8048, for plaintiff and moving party;
Kevin P. Allen, Esq. of Low Ball & Lynch, Tel. 415.981.8830, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: After hearing, the court ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF SINFOROSA BUSTRIA's Motion To Compel Defendant To Provide Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions is Granted. Order signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge: Bruce Highman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
